members.label: stove
members.description: stainless steel gas range with oven and towel on handle
members.long_form_open_description: Freestanding stainless steel gas range and oven centered on the back wall. Black burner grates visible on top; oven door has a towel hanging from the handle. Some small items on the countertop nearby.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: Beneath the built-in microwave and flanked by lower cabinetry and countertops.
